eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Morton; Mercer; Oliver; Grant; Sioux, ND; at 12:12 PM on FEB 6, 2019 Effective until 1:12 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of the Morton County Emergency Alert System. This concludes the test.
